scripts.check:architecture: pnpm check:package-scripts && pnpm check:generated-artifacts && pnpm check:architecture-imports && pnpm check:rust-boundaries && pnpm check:public-export && pnpm check:architecture-fixtures
scripts.format: prettier --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json eslint.config.js .prettierrc.json README.md "docs/**/*.md" "apps/**/*.{json,ts,tsx}" "packages/**/*.{json,ts,tsx}" "scripts/**/*.mjs"
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json eslint.config.js .prettierrc.json README.md "docs/**/*.md" "apps/**/*.{json,ts,tsx}" "packages/**/*.{json,ts,tsx}" "scripts/**/*.mjs"
scripts.rust:verify: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-/tmp/bowline-dev-target} cargo fmt --check && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-/tmp/bowline-dev-target} cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-/tmp/bowline-dev-target} cargo test --workspace
scripts.verify:public: pnpm --filter @bowline/config test && pnpm --filter @bowline/contracts test && pnpm --filter @bowline/contracts build && pnpm --filter @bowline/control-plane typecheck && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-/tmp/bowline-dev-target} cargo test --workspace && pnpm check:public-export && pnpm check:architecture
